# Project — Copilot Instructions

This is a Monorepo with well-defined boundaries.

## Step 1: Read the Rules
 
Read [how-we-work.md](..\knowledge_base\shared_knowledge\how-we-work.md) in full. It links to four locked specs:

| Spec | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [**Code Architecture & Patterns**](..\technical-leadership\architecture-patterns.md)| Where code lives, layering rules, mandates/bans|
| [**Team Workflow & PR Culture**](..\technical-leadership\development-workflow.md) | Branching, PR size/review, commit hygiene, docs |
| [**Infra & DevOps Philosophy**](..\technical-leadership\infrastructure-philosophy.md) | IaC, environments, pipeline, secrets, containers |
| [**Data Layer & Observability**](..\technical-leadership\data-observability.md) | Schema contracts, structured logging, metrics, tracing |
 
These decisions are **locked**. Do not diverge from them. 

To propose a change, escalate to up the chain of command: ICs -> Leads -> Exec.
